GeneDef.label: solar charger
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene do not lose nutrients in bright light from the energyshifter gene, but they lose significantly more nutrients overall.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Reduces <color=#8a8ae6>resource consumption</color> relative to ambient light <color=#8a8ae6>brightness</color>.
Replenishes 60% of <color=#8a8ae6>resource</color> per day when exposed to <color=#8a8ae6>sunlight</color>.
